item.title: Skills
item.description: All of my technical competencies connected to my data science portfolio are described on this page. All the operating systems, tools, technologies, libraries, frameworks, and tools. Languages: Big Data Technologies: Databases: Cloud Technologies: Containers: Machine Learning: Visualization Tools: Editors: Others: Linux Related: Python Related: JavaScript Related:
